resources.string: Address submitted is incorrect. Please correct and try again.
Behind the Scenes Magic in Progress
Note:" Your Home MINTernet Line Number can be found on the gateway's display screen. From the gateway's display screen hit the scroll buttons until the Internet Line Number is shown. "
Please give us a minute while we process your order
Please give us a minute while we process your request
Please give us a minute to set up your service
Unfortunately, your cancellation could not be processed and did not go through. Please try again later.
We sent a 6-digit code to (xxx) xxx-%s.
We sent you a code to %s***@%s to verify that you are the owner of this account.
We sent you a code to (***)***%s to verify that you are the owner of this account.
We sent you a code to your email to verify that you are the owner of this account.
We sent you a code to your phone number to verify that you are the owner of this account.
We’re unable to cancel your coverage
This means your friend activated their new plan and you received credit for referring them.
What does Days to Reset refer to?
This is a countdown to January 1st. You have until then to refer up to 4 friends and get credit for the calendar year.
What does Lifetime Credits Earned mean?
This is the amount of credit you’ve received since becoming a Mint user.
Pending Status refers to the 15-day period it takes for Mint credit to show up in your account after your friend activates their new plan.
You will not be able to access the account at this time. If you believe this was an error, please chat with us.

When searching for businesses or places near a location, Google Maps will show local results. Several factors - primarily relevance, distance and prominence - are combined to help find the best results for a search.
It’s important that you have a valid, secure email address on your account. It will be used for account verification and security.

"With a Mint Kid's Plan, parents have full control over their kid's wireless plan, managing everything from data usage to billing. It’s flexible, affordable and designed specifically for kids. We value your privacy, so only the parent's email will be contacted for anything beyond account notifications."
For an adult (18 or age of majority)
"Loving your trial? Then it's time for the full enchilada."
Allow location to fill in the ZIP Code
"Oops. This ZIP code isn't in our coverage area."
Why do I need a new number?
This is just your trial. You can always transfer your number later.
"This is the part where you decide to keep your kid's number or get them a new one… either one is good with us."

By checking the box, I affirm the above statement is true, and that I have read and agree to Mint Mobile’s Plan Terms Conditions, Privacy Policy, Acceptable Use Policy, Verifiable Parental Consent (“VPC”) Notice, and Children’s Privacy Policy, and that I am the age of majority and legally authorized to enter into those agreements.

I am the parent or legal guardian of a Child (or Children) whose use of the Mint Kids Plan, in accordance with Mint’s policies, I expressly authorize; and I expressly consent to the collection of personal information of my Child(ren) as described in the Verifiable Parental Consent (“VPC”) Notice and the Children’s Privacy Policy.
We accept payments from all major credit card companies, as well as PayPal and Google Pay.
"Your phone is covered - nice. Now that you've got access to the largest service network for repairs, you can rest easy around oceans, roof-top pools and unforeseen obstacles."
"Oops-proof your phone from jacuzzi tubs, cracked displays and more, so if anything breaks, you won't go broke fixing it. Sign up and get protection in just 2 clicks."
"Your phone is almost fully oops-proofed. Nice work. We'll let you know when your phone is officially safe from phone accidents."
Make your Ultra Mobile plan renewals even easier by activating Auto Recharge

By enabling Auto Renewal, you agree that Mint will automatically renew your plan and continue to charge you the full plan cost to your payment method unless you cancel before the end of each billing cycle. Three-month promotional plans will renew at full price. You may cancel at any time by logging into your account online or calling Customer Care.
"Bring your friends over to Mint and they'll get $15 in renewal credit, plus you'll receive some credit too. We made the process super easy on purpose."
Unable to activate SIM at this time. Please go back and re-enter your account details and SIM card information again.

"The billing information you entered was declined. Please review the information you entered and try again.
If the problem persists, please contact your card issuer or try using a different payment method."
Oops! Please enter a valid US ZIP code.
Oops! Please enter a valid US ZIP code.
Oops! This zip code is not in our coverage area.
• Customers who use over 50GB a month may notice reduced data speeds for the rest of their monthly cycle in certain locations when our network is busy
• Customers who use over 35GB a month may notice reduced data speeds for the rest of their monthly cycle in certain locations when our network is busy
Need more data while in Canada? Click here to buy a Canada Roaming data add-on.
Your 3GB of Canada roaming data will refresh each month, just like your regular plan data
Your 3GB of data and unlimited talk & text kick in as soon as you enter Canada
"You don't need a Minternational Pass, saving you time & money"
You can buy data add-ons if you need more than 3GB
Heads up: Data add-ons do not rollover to the next month. Canada data add-ons can only be used while roaming in Canada.
Not for extended international use. Coverage not available in some areas. See https://www.mintmobile.com/plan-terms-and-conditions for details. Minternational Pass not avail. for use in Canada.
"You'll use this password to manage your gateway settings and log into this app."

"Upfront payment req'd. Taxes & fees extra. Customers who use over 35GB a month may notice reduced data speeds for the rest of their monthly cycle in certain locations when our network is busy. Includes hotspot up to 10GB on Unlimited/20GB on Unnecessary. See terms"

"Upfront payment req'd. Taxes & fees extra. Customers who use over 50GB a month may notice reduced data speeds for the rest of their monthly cycle in certain locations when our network is busy. Includes hotspot up to 20GB on Unlimited and Unnecessary plans. See terms."
Now that your gateway is ready, you can update your Wi-Fi network name.
Choose a new password for your Wi-Fi network.
Please contact support to activate chat in your app
"We’re sorry but messaging is not available at the moment. Please contact support for more details"
Only admin is allowed to send messages.
Do you want to send a message without text?
Uploading this file is not supported.
Permissions were not granted for Camera or Audio recording
Tap on Start to record audio
UserId can not be null or empty and channel key list should not be null
Please check group name is null or empty or it has at least one member to be added in group
You need to have network access for loading contacts
Please enter a group name to proceed..
Not able to fetch message info.
Oops! You caught an error, try again later
UserId can not be null or empty and channel key should not be null
Camera and record audio permission are needed to access
Do you want to cancel this transaction?
Unable to add participant in group because you are not a participant
Unable to change the group name because you are not a participant
Unable to change the group description because you are not a participant
Group name can not be empty
Contact permission are needed to access
Permission were not granted for Contact
Contact sync is in progress, might take few mins
at %s delivered and read by recipient
Are you sure you want to delete [group] [groupType]?
If you go back now, your video will be discarded.
Editing channel description is not allowed
enter your queries, bug reporting or feedback here
Are you sure you want to exit [group] [groupType]?
file name will come here for attachment
Did you miss selecting the file?
Please contact support to activate chat in your app
You can only select 21 images at once.
Are you sure you want to exit this page?
Limit reached, remove someone from the Group first
Hold to record , release to send
No application found to open this file
"Can't send maximum uploading file size limit exceeded!"
"Can't send maximum uploading file size limit exceeded"
Messages will be broadcast to each recipient individually
"Can't send! Some unexpected error occurred while reading file"
Syncing messages with the server, it might take few minutes!
Your phone needs an Internet connection to change the group info
The Regex to match message is invalid
Download this app from this link : apps.khoros.com
Are you sure you want to exit from this [groupType]?
Location permission are needed to access
Permissions were not granted for Location
Sending location requires access to your location. Turn on location access.
- Brand Messenger android SDK text logs
This message has been reported successfully
Conversations loading error. Please try again.
Phone call permission are needed to access
Phone call Permission has been granted
Permissions were not granted for Phone call
Camera and audio permissions has been granted
Camera permission are needed to access
Permissions were not granted for Camera
Phone state permission are needed to access
Phone state Permissions has been granted
Permissions were not granted for Phone state
Notification permissions are needed to receive notifications
Permissions were not granted for receiving notifications
We are powered by Brand Messenger
Read sms permission are needed to access
Read sms Permissions have been granted
Permissions were not granted for Read
Audio Record permissions has been granted
Permissions were not granted for Audio recording
This is a release build and logging is enabled. Please disable logging before you upload your app on play store
At least 1 contact must be selected
Select date and time to schedule your message.
Error creating new chat session. Please try again.
Storage permission are needed to access
Permissions were not granted for Storage
Do you want to sync older messages?
Tap on mic button to start audio recording
It might take several minutes to receive the email.
Request failed. Please try again later.
Unable to share you are not a participant of this group
No application found to open this file
Block [name]? A blocked user will no longer be able to send you messages
Unable to send user is blocked
You are no longer a participant of this group
"You don't have any network access now"
You need to have network access for block/unblock a user
You need to have network access for deleting Conversation
No matching contact found on phone contacts but you can still send message by entering the email, userId or phone number
"We have no updates. Please check again later."
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Add more International Call Credit to your Ultra plan for as low as $5.
Need something different? See All Plans
Check back tomorrow and you should see your Home MINTernet dashboard once your order ships.
We’re processing your payment, which could take a minute or two. Pull down to reload.
Looks like you missed your payment. Renew now to get back to that no bill chill life.
Looks like you missed your payment. Renew now to get back to that no-bill chill life.
Make a payment to get back up and running
Heads up: Data add-ons do not rollover to the next month.
Buy a data add-on to get you through the end of the month.
Buy a data add-on to get you through the end of the month. This data add-on can be used for hotspot only.
Add more data to your Ultra plan for as low as $5.

"Upfront payment of $45 for 3-month plan (equiv. to $15/mo.) req'd. New customer offer first 3 months only; then full-price plan options available. Taxes & fees extra. Heavy data users (>40GB/mo.) may temporarily notice reduced speeds when our network is busy. Includes up to 10GB hotspot. Videos stream at ~480p. See terms.."
Did you lose or damage your SIM card? No problem, order a new SIM card.

"Upfront payment of $45 for 3-month plan (equiv. to $15/mo.) req'd. New customer offer first 3 months only; then full-price plan options available. Taxes & fees extra. Customers who use over 35GB a month may notice reduced data speeds for the rest of their monthly cycle in certain locations when our network is busy. Includes up to 10GB hotspot. Videos stream at ~480p. See terms."
Capable device required. Coverage not available in some areas. 10GB/mo. mobile hotspot on Unlimited plans. See full terms for details.
All plans include the same features. Tap any one to see the full broadband facts.

Imagine getting a holiday card from your wireless company. Yep, we do that. Plus from time to time, we have some pretty awesome offers. Your info is managed in accordance with our privacy policy: mintmobile.com/privacy-policy.

To update your email, you will need to provide a one-time password sent to you via text message. You will then receive an email to the new address that you must respond to within 24 hours to complete verification. You will also have to wait 30 days before you can use this email for account recovery.
Your email address needs to be verified

You already have a verification email waiting in your inbox. To complete email verification, you need to click the link in that email within 24 hours of receiving it. You will also need to wait 30 days before you can use this email for account recovery.
Your email address still needs to be verified

To update your email, you will need to provide a one-time password sent to you via text message. You will then receive an email to the new address that you must respond to within 24 hours to complete verification, or the email address on your account will revert back to the one that was previously verified. You will also need to wait 30 days before you can use this new email for account recovery.
Your new email address needs to be verified

"We can't send you a one-time password via email because your email address hasn't been on your account for at least 30 days. You can update your email address in the \"My Details\" tab in your account settings."

"If you don’t want to give the Mint app camera access, please enter your gateway details below.
Note: granting access in phone settings now may restart the setup process."
An appLinkUri or returnUrlScheme is required.
You need to have Auto Renewal enabled to have a Mint Family. To remove, you first need to delete your family.
No installed activities can open this URL: %1$s
There was a problem displaying your current data usage. Please swipe down to refresh the page or check again at a later time.

"The return url scheme was not set up, incorrectly set up, or more than one Activity on this device defines the same url scheme in it's Android Manifest. See https://github.com/braintree/browser-switch-android for more information on setting up a return url scheme."
We’re unable to complete your request for new eSIM. Please try again later.
If you’ve already added a data add-on this month you won’t be able to add it again until you’ve used 95% of the current one.
We’re unable to complete your purchase. Please try again later.
Unable to complete your purchase at this time. Try again later.
This add-on was already added this month and you won’t be able to add it again until 95% of the current one have been used.
This payment method was declined by your financial institution. Please update your payment method information and try again.
You need a payment method on your account to have a Mint Family. To remove, you first need to delete your family.
This payment method was declined by your financial institution and cannot be used. Please review the information and try again.
Go to Network & Internet in your device Settings
Tap on Add Mobile Network (the + icon)
Follow directions on your device till you reach scanner
Tap on Need help button below scanner
Proceed with Enter it manually and paste there
Number Lock has been automatically enabled due to suspicious activity on your account. You can try disabling Number Lock at a later time.
"If you enable this feature, then try to disable it, we'll have to send you a time-based one-time password (TOTP) to your Mint Mobile number or email just to make sure it’s actually you."

"Before you can replace your current SIM, activate a new SIM, or change your device, you'll need to disable Number Lock. We'll send a time-based one-time password (TOTP) to confirm your identity before Number Lock can be disabled."

"Number Lock helps prevent unauthorized users from hijacking your SIM, your number and ultimately your account. Once it's on, turning it off requires a one-time password be sent to your phone number or email address (that's been on your account for at least 30 days) to confirm it's you."
"• This code expires in 30 mins. • For Kid’s Plans, codes are sent to the parent’s email. • Didn’t receive a code? Call Care at (800) 683–7392"
Just doing some routine maintenance and we’ll be back shortly, promise.
A new version of the app is available in the Play Store. Please update and continue using your Mint Mobile app.
Please contact our Account Verification team.
There was a problem with your account activation

"A group of foxes is called a skulk.
I just call them friends."

"Foxes have whiskers on their legs and face for navigation purposes.
Also, Google Maps."

"Foxes hunt on their own, not in packs.
Mostly for pizza and corn dogs."

"Some foxes live in underground dens.
I live in an above ground condo."
Some foxes can hear a watch ticking 40 yards away. I don’t even hear my alarm clock #snoozebutton.

"Please make sure your gateway is fully powered on and try again.
If that doesn’t work, you may need to connect to Wi-Fi manually by going to your phone’s settings and entering the network name and password printed on your gateway’s label."
We’re having trouble connecting to your gateway
Please make sure your gateway is plugged in and online, then try again. If this issue continues, contact Customer Care for help.
An error occurred restarting your gateway
Calling the Philippines? Globe Unlimited provides unlimited calling to 5 different Philippine phone numbers on the Globe network for only $10 extra on your plan.
Customers who purchase additional hotspot may notice reduced data speeds for rest of their monthly cycle in certain locations when our network is busy. Taxes & fees extra. See terms.

"The ideal placement is by a window avoiding direct sunlight, preferably on the top floor of your home.
Note: Refrigerators, microwaves, etc. could interfere with signal."
If cancelled after 30 days from purchase, refunds will be a prorated depending on cancellation date.
If you want to transfer your number.
Please check your phone number and password
Check the back of your card for ACT code
Feel confident knowing you’ll get your money back if you don’t like the service.
This app was born to help you outsmart big wireless. Feel free to swipe or click something now.
"Feel free to keep your current phone number because it’s the one everyone remembers. Bring your phone too."
We sell wireless in bulk (3, 6 and 12/mo plans). The more months you buy, the more you save.
"See what we're all about and even try us out for 7 days"
"By using Mint Mobile's app you agree to our"
Note: Your internet line number is shown on the screen of your 5G gateway device. You can use the scroll buttons on the device to find it.
I Need to Set Up My Gateway
If it is, go ahead and select “My gateway is set up” to continue.
Note:" Since you're on a kid's plan, you're not able to create a Mint Family or serve as a primary."

Upfront payment of $45 for 3‑month plan (equiv. to $15/mo.) req’d. New customer offer first 3 months only, then full‑price plan options available. Taxes & fees extra. Customers who use over 50 GB a month may notice reduced data speeds for the rest of their monthly cycle in certain locations when our network is busy. Includes up to 20 GB hotspot. Videos stream at 480p. See terms.

Upfront payment of $45 for 3‑month plan (equiv. to $15/mo.) req’d. New customer offer first 3 months only, then full‑price plan options available. Taxes & fees extra. Customers who use over 35 GB a month may notice reduced data speeds for the rest of their monthly cycle in certain locations when our network is busy. Includes up to 10 GB hotspot. Videos stream at 480p. See terms.
"• For Kid's Plans, codes are sent to the parent's email. • This code expires in 10 mins. • Can’t receive code? Call Care at (800) 683-7392"
Your new number will be based on your ZIP code, not some random one.
• Didn’t receive a code? Call Care at 800-683-7392
• For Home MINTernet, you can find your code on the screen of your gateway device.
• For Kid’s Plans, codes are sent to the parent’s email.
We sent you a code to verify that you are the owner of this account.
We sent you a code to %s to verify that you are the owner of this account.
To reset your password, enter your username or the phone number associated with your wireless or Home MINTernet account.
Provide the email address associated with your Home MINTernet account.
Wireless or Home MINTernet Line Number
Success, a text message will arrive shortly. Use the link to create new password.
Our system is currently under maintenance
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.

"By choosing to receive communications from Mint, you agree that Mint Mobile and its affiliates—including parent companies, subsidiaries, sister brands, and any other related entities under common ownership or control—may send you occasional updates, special offers, and promos. No spammy nonsense—just useful things we think you’ll appreciate. Your choice to opt in (or out) doesn’t affect your ability to use Mint services. You can change your mind and update your communication preferences or unsubscribe anytime in the app or through your account settings. P.S. Your data’s in good hands. For details on how we handle and share your info (including with our affiliates), check out our"
You can renew your support, you just need to do it within 30 days of expiration. Please try again when you reach that timeframe.
"We're unable to renew your MINTech Advisors… yet"
Guess what? Your leftover roaming balance is going straight to your Mint wallet, which you can use to get a roaming pass.
Heads up: Passes expire 360 days after purchase. Once activated, your pass will expire exactly %s days post-activation. Each account is limited to 3 passes (2 stored passes, 1 active pass).
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
"Assign a new Primary to manage your Mint Family. You'll still be a member of this Mint Family, although no longer in charge of all payments and individual account changes."
You will no longer be responsible for the members of your family

"Your Mint Mobile service is provided by UVNV, Inc., including its affiliates, assigns and agents (“Mint Mobile,” “we,” “us” or “our”).
"What are these terms?" These Terms and Conditions (“T&Cs”) are part of your service agreement with Mint Mobile and constitute a contract under which we provide you Service under terms and conditions that you accept. Your service agreement (“Agreement”) with us includes (i) these T&Cs, (ii) our website Terms of Use located at mintmobile.com/site-terms-of-use, (iii) our Privacy Policy located at mintmobile.com/ privacy-policy, (iv) our Acceptable Use Policy located at mintmobile.com/acceptable -use-policy, (v) any subscriber agreement or transaction materials that you sign or accept, (vi) the service plan(s) that you choose as set forth in our written services and transaction materials that we provide or refer you to during the sales transaction (if your service plan is not specifically set forth in any printed materials, the requirements and terms set forth in the current written services and transaction materials apply, excluding plan charges and number of minutes included in your service plan), (vii) any confirmation materials that we may provide to you, (viii) the terms set forth in any applicable coverage map brochures, and (ix) any other supplemental terms and conditions that we provide or otherwise make available to you.
In the event of a conflict between these T&Cs and any other materials that makeup the Agreement, these T&Cs shall govern to the extent necessary to resolve the conflict."
"This means your gateway isn't receiving a strong signal from outside. Let's run through a couple steps to make sure it's in a good location."

Note: Credits are applied within 2 weeks after friend’s plan is activated and can only be used on plan renewals. You can earn credits for up to 4 friends per calendar year. If you refer 5 or more friends, only your friends will receive the credit.
Invalid SSL certificate. Do you want to continue?
"Once enabled, turning off Number Lock requires a one-time password be sent to your phone number or an email address (that's been on your account for at least 30 days) to confirm it's you."

"Your email address has been on your account for fewer than 30 days. If you want to turn off Number Lock, you'll need to confirm your identity via text message or wait until your email has been on your account for 30 days."
"• This code expires in 10 mins. • Didn't receive a code? Call Care at (800) 683–7392"
Sit back, relax and enjoy watching the savings roll in.
"It's just a few easy steps to get the most out of your service."
Oooops... Something went wrong, please try again
We’ll assign a number based on the ZIP code entered.
We’ll assign your kid a number based on their ZIP code so they don’t have some weird one.
Cool, make sure you have your account number, passcode & billing address from your old carrier.
"Cool, just make sure you have your kid's account number, passcode & billing address from their old carrier."

string.name: orange_transfer_number_activation_disclaimer_text
string.b: Most number transfers take less than 5 minutes. Make sure your details are correct, as errors could delay your request up to 48 hours.

resources.string:
"Your request was unable to be completed because of an error. It could be one of the following issues:
• Your current carrier denied the request • There is a pending request with this number • The number you entered is not an active number"
Please contact your current carrier to resolve the issue. Then try the port again by selecting the button below. (Incorrect account information will delay your port by several hours or days).
"Sorry there's been a problem transferring your number"
We’ll send you a SIM card in the mail so you can activate your free trial. Your free trial won’t affect your current service and includes:
Wait for it to come in the mail
"For just $5, we'll send you a card"
When you upgrade to a full plan, the $5 you spent on your 7-Day trial will be discounted off the price of the plan.
Use at least 8 characters, 1 number, 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, and 1 special character.
You need a browser or the Google Maps app to open this link
Profile image of the user who uploaded the photo
Please give us a minute to activate your SIM card
It looks like your account number is incorrect, so we couldn’t transfer your number.
It looks like there is a problem with your carrier information, so we couldn’t transfer your number.
There is a problem with the payment information you entered, please review your information and try again. If the problem persists, please contact your card issuer or try using a different card.
It looks like your PIN/password is incorrect, so we couldn’t transfer your number.
It looks like your ZIP code is incorrect, so we couldn’t transfer your number.

Ultra Privacy PolicyThe following sets forth the Privacy Policy (“Privacy Policy”) of UVNV, Inc. and its Affiliates (collectively, “Ultra Mobile,” “we” or “us”), and is incorporated into and made a part of Ultra Mobile’s Plans Terms and Conditions, Ultra Mobile’s Terms of Use and Ultra Mobile’s Terms of Use for Retailers and Distributors. For purposes of this Privacy Policy, “Affiliates” means any entity that directly or indirectly controls, iscontrolled by, or is under common control with UVNV, Inc., where “control” means the ownership of, or the power to vote, at least ten percent (10%) of the voting stock, shares or interests of such entity.1. Purpose of Privacy PolicyYour privacy is important to Ultra Mobile. Accordingly, Ultra Mobile provides these policies so that you understand how Ultra Mobile collects, uses and, in certain circumstances, discloses the information that you provide and/or that is automatically provided to Ultra Mobile as a result of your visiting and using the ultra.me web site or any other website owned and operated by Ultra Mobile (collectively, the “Web site”) or purchasing or using Ultra Mobile products or services. This Privacy Policy also explains the steps Ultra Mobile has taken to secure your personal information. Finally, this Privacy Policy explains your options regarding the collection, use and disclosure of your personal information. By visitingthe Web site or purchasing or using any Ultra Mobile product or service, you accept the practices described in this Privacy Policy. Ultra Mobile is not responsible for the content or privacy practices on any third party web site that may be linked to or from the Web site.Any questions regarding this Privacy Policy should be directed to:Attn: Privacy Policy Officer UVNV, Inc. PO Box 28673 Santa Ana, CA 92799 Email: info@ultra.me2. Collection and Use of Personal InformationPersonal information is information that identifies or is associated with a specific individual, such as a name, address, email address, or telephone number. Ultra Mobile collects personal information about its customers. The ways in which we collect personal information about you include, but are not limited to, the following:• Registration and Ordering. Before using certain parts of the Web site or purchasingUltra Mobile products or services, you must complete an online registration form or
"Well played, you’ve got your next 3 months FREE"
Use your Renewal Balance to switch to a 12 month plan and save. Select the banner above to grab this offer.
Use your renewal balance to upgrade your FREE 3 months to 12 months

Limited-Time Promotional Offer: Subject to change. New activation required using an IMEI and/or phone number not previously associated with any Mint Mobile account in the prior 90 days. Taxes and fees extra. 3 months of promotional credits will be applied after eligibility verification and account activation, and will be no less than the value of the initial plan purchased. Final promotional credit value subject to change and may be applied directly to renewal/upgraded plan. Offer only valid through 11:59 PM PST on 1/2/2021 for in-store purchases at Best Buy and at BestBuy.com and at 11:59 PM PST on 1/4/2021 for all other purchases. In-store purchases must be activated prior to 1/2/2021; all other channels have 45 days to activate. May not be combined with other promotions. Limit 4 per in-store or online order. Plans renew at regular rates. Usage Limitations: 4G LTE access and/or 5G speed requires a 4G LTE and/or 5G capable device inside an appropriate coverage area. Actual availability, coverage, and speed may vary. 5G • 4G LTE data speeds may be slowed to 128 kbps after use of monthly allotment or temporarily during times of network congestion Video typically streams at 480p. Unlimited Data: Unlimited means speeds will be reduced to a max of 128Kbps after >35GB/mo. or use of GB allotment for the remainder of the billing cycle. 1 month equals 30 days. Partial megabytes rounded up. Unlimited on handset and network only. Unlimited Nationwide Calling: Requires eligible domestic service plan on the account with primary usage in the United States. Mobile Hotspot: No additional charge for hotspot capability; data utilizes monthly allotment of available high-speed data; Tethering or hotspot data service may not exceed 5GB/mo. in total usage per bill cycle Free Calls to Mexico and Canada: Outbound mobile-to-landline and mobile-to-mobile calls. Per minute rates may apply for outbound mobile-to-landline or mobile-to-mobile voice calls to other int’l destinations. Int’l Calls: Int’l long-distance services are provided by PLD, LLC. PLD is not affiliated with Mint Mobile. Other Terms: Mint Mobile reserves the right to modify or discontinue this offer at any time without notice. Offer not redeemable for cash or credit toward any purchase. Refunds limited to value of plan actually purchased and are not available for unused promotional credits. Void where prohibited by law. Use of the Mint Mobile service is subject to the Mint Mobile Terms & Conditions. Please read the Terms & Conditions before activating any service plans.

Phone purchase is protected for mechanical/electrical breakdowns and accidental damage (does not include coverage for loss, theft or intentional damage). A service fee applies to all phone claims. Service fee amounts vary by phone and the type of resolution needed. View service fee tiers of the Allstate Protection Plan at our Help Center.
"Refer friends to Mint and you'll both get some renewal credit."

Note: Credits are applied 15 days after friend’s plan is activated and can only be used on plan renewals. You can earn credits for up to 4 friends per calendar year. If you refer 5 or more friends, only your friends will receive the credit.
Be the savings hero your friends need
Save your friends from overpriced wireless
Refer a friend, get 3 months on us
Save them from overpriced wireless and you can get up to $90 in credit for each friend you refer
Please double check your details, or contact your current carrier to confirm. (Incorrect account information will delay your port by several hours or days).
The details you entered during activation are not correct
Reviews aren’t verified by Google, but Google checks for and removes fake content when it’s identified.

"Stay connected while you’re exploring the world with talk, text and data.
International Roaming Credits "never expire and are applied after purchase. Unused credits rollover each month. Text ROAM to 6700 to check your balance.
Traveling abroad? Add INTL Roaming to enjoy your Ultra plan wherever you go!
Get the plan that fits you just right
"You're enjoying the no bill chill life, now keep those savings going for even longer with a 12-month plan. It will fit you like your favorite pair of jeans (or yoga pants - no judgement)"
Try scanning the QR code again, or enter the details manually.
Use your phone’s camera to scan the QR code on the bottom of your gateway.
Point your phone’s camera at the QR code so the code is clearly visible.
Your gateway is ready to use. Some updates may run overnight to keep things up to date.
Watch our short video on the best places to put your gateway.
Let’s find the ideal location for your gateway
"• This code expires in 10 mins. • Can’t receive code? Call Care at (800) 683-7392"
" We’re here 7 days a week from 5am to 7pm PST."

Success message description, may be longer text. Or maybe not, IDK. Success message description, may be longer text. Or maybe not, IDK. Success message description, may be longer text. Our Help Center has FAQs, how-tos and all the info you might need for your Home MINTernet. And if you have any other questions, you can chat with us there too.
"Our FoxBot has quick answers right in the app. But if you're more the FAQ/informational guide type, check out our Help Center."
Try us out for 3 months at our lowest possible price. Simply choose one of the plans below and leave overpriced wireless behind.
The verification is not valid or has expired. Please double-check your code and try again.
The verification is not valid or has expired. Please double-check your code and try again.
The verification is not valid or has expired. Please double-check your code and try again.
Too many attempts to enter code (happens to the best of us). Wait a few minutes then hit the back arrow to try again.
This can take a few minutes, so don’t exit out of this screen.
Time to make sure it’s you
Your account information has been updated.
Your new gateway has not been activated yet
Your new gateway has been activated
Please try to activate your device again.
Your next plan has been scheduled.
Why are there two SIM cards?
Note: during your One Night Plan, you’ll get a temporary phone number to use how you wish without interrupting your current service.
"All good things don't have to come to an end. Upgrade to a full plan today."
Your trial is up. Join Mint and get $5 off
Wondering how this whole trial thing works?
You have a Mint Mobile Trial kit!
First, you get a fresh new phone number to use

"Remember this is just temporary.
You can always transfer your current number when you purchase a plan."
The first SIM is for your trial. The second is to transfer your current number when you purchase a full plan.
When you upgrade to a full plan, the $5 you spent on your 7-Day trial will be discounted off the price of the plan.
"We'll put your $5 toward a Full Plan"
The trial works just like a regular wireless plan
Your are using old version of the app. :( go to Play Store and update
We’ve sent an email with your username. Check your inbox and use that username to log in.
We sent a 6-digit code to %s to verify that you are the owner of this account.
We sent you a code to %s to verify that you are the owner of this account.

"We can't send you a time-based one-time password (TOTP) via email because there's no valid or verified email associated with your account. You can update your email in the 'My details’ tab within your account settings."
Select SMS or Email below and we will send you a 6-digit code to verify your identity
We couldn’t match your email to a wireless account on Mint. Please try entering your Home MINTernet line number instead.

Your Ultra Mobile wallet can be used to pay for international phone calls and other account services like UpData purchases. There is no risk to loading your Ultra Mobile wallet, as unused wallet balances will roll over from month to month.
We sent a text to the phone number associated with your account. Reply to that text to proceed.
We’re unable to confirm your identity
The app was unable to connect to Wi-Fi automatically. Go back and try again or follow the steps below to connect manually.
You’ll BOTH get renewal credit once they activate their plan
You’re all set. You’ll receive an email confirmation soon.
Your phone will no longer be protected, and any open claims will go unresolved. If you have open claims, you’ll want to get those completed before cancelling.
